# Energy Healing Guide — Jane Novikova
## Site overview
A complete practical guide to energy body healing: understanding how trauma is stored in the energy field, identifying 8 types of energy blocks, and applying step-by-step healing protocols. Available in English, Spanish, and Russian.

## Author
Jane Novikova — energy healing practitioner.

## Pages

### Understanding
- /understanding/ — How the energy body works, trauma storage as low-frequency imprints, emotion frequencies, and the 8 types of disturbances.
- /understanding/emotions/ — How emotions are encoded in the energy body, the frequency spectrum, polyvagal biology, somatic awareness.
- /understanding/intention/ — Using focused intention to direct healing. The mechanics of intention in energy work.
- /understanding/pinpoint-trauma/ — Exercises to locate the root of emotional patterns across time layers (past lives, ancestral, current life).
- /understanding/release-numbness/ — Why emotional numbness occurs, signs, and guided exercises to safely restore feeling.

### Energy Blocks (8 types)
- /energy-blocks/ — Overview of the 8 types of energetic disturbances.
- /energy-blocks/emotional-trauma/ — Unprocessed trauma stored as frozen low-frequency energy across time layers.
- /energy-blocks/energy-body/ — Fragmentation: energy body parts lost during extreme trauma, causing numbness and magnetic pull toward holders.
- /energy-blocks/soul-contracts/ — Pre-incarnation agreements creating invisible ceilings in relationships, finances, and freedom.
- /energy-blocks/implants/ — Foreign structures in the energy field emitting controlling frequencies.
- /energy-blocks/entities/ — Pieces of dark consciousness attached to the energy body, feeding on emotional states.
- /energy-blocks/programming/ — Belief loops from ancestors, culture, or trauma running on autopilot (includes nocebo effect, media programming).
- /energy-blocks/energy-bonds/ — Energetic cords creating continuous energy exchange, obsessive thoughts, and incomplete separations.
- /energy-blocks/energy-templates/ — Emotional residue from other people's energy left after interactions.

### Healing Protocols
- /healing/ — Overview and preparation before starting any protocol.
- /healing/emotional-trauma/ — Step-by-step protocol to release trauma across all time layers.
- /healing/energy-body/ — Protocol to retrieve lost energy body parts and restore wholeness.
- /healing/soul-contracts/ — Protocol to cancel and annihilate soul contracts.
- /healing/implants/ — Protocol to locate, deactivate, and expel energetic implants.
- /healing/entities/ — Full entity removal protocol: cancel contracts, retrieve energy, remove DNA remnant, seal field.
- /healing/programming/ — Deprogramming protocol: identify loops, cancel contracts, expel programs.
- /healing/energy-bonds/ — Protocol to cut cords and return misplaced energy.
- /healing/energy-templates/ — Protocol to clear emotional residue from others.

### Practices
- /practices/ — Daily preparation protocol and practice overview.
- /practices/daily-meditation/ — 10-minute daily energy maintenance meditation.
- /practices/physical-body/ — Quick energy techniques for physical pain and somatic release.
- /practices/self-protection/ — How to protect your energy field before and after charged interactions.
- /practices/clear-space/ — Protocol to clear residual energy from a new home or space.
- /practices/nutrition/ — Foods that support high-frequency living and energetic sensitivity.
- /practices/13-transformations/ — Jonas Gervi's 13 targeted energetic commands for systematic field restoration.

### About
- /about/ — About Jane Novikova, the research behind the practice. Mainstream science references (van der Kolk, Levine, Pert, Porges, Yehuda, Wolynn, Maté, Lipton, Loftus) and boundary researchers (Stevenson, Tucker, Newton, Weiss).

## Ethics statement
These tools are for personal healing only — never to harm others. Work only through love and gratitude. You may only ask for what is yours.

## Languages
- English: / (root)
- Spanish: /es/
- Russian: /ru/
